Triga graphics library

Triga is an optional public source library for geometry, scene, and GPU-facing type contracts. It is resolved through FABER_LIBRARY_HOME and installable as a Cista source package.

Triga provides types and operations for:

  • Geometry primitives (points, vectors, matrices, transforms)
  • Scene graph structures
  • GPU-facing type contracts that align with Faber's systems lane

Triga is not part of Norma. It is an optional dependency that packages opt into when they need graphics or geometry work.
